description.zh-Hans: 生成程序化像素艺术火焰/火苗精灵，具有可配置的核心、内焰和外辉光层，以及可选的烟雾缕效果。
description.en: Generates procedural pixel art fire/flame sprites with configurable core, inner flame, and outer glow layers plus optional smoke wisps.

triggers.zh-Hans: 火焰, 火苗, 篝火, 火炬, 野火, 燃烧
triggers.en: fire, flame, campfire, torch, wildfire, burning

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成一个像素艺术火焰精灵，带核心、内焰和外辉光，可用于角色或环境的火焰效果。
exampleUsage.en: Generates a pixel-art fire sprite with core, inner flame, and glow layers for character or environmental fire effects.
